items.title: US wants Iran to pledge to stop shooting at ships in Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: US media say Iran has told US officials an attack on ships crossing the strait early this week was "a mistake".

items.title: Spain battles to contain one of its deadliest wildfires as at least 12 killed
items.summary: At least four Britons are believed to be among the victims of the blaze, which left another 23 people missing.

items.title: Trump administration subpoenas New York Times journalists over Air Force One reporting
items.summary: The reporters received the legal summons after they reported on alleged security issues with the president's new plane, which was gifted by Qatar.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 如何直追台積電？韓媒：英特爾、三星豪賭押注高風險晶片技術
items.summary: 韓國朝鮮日報旗下ChosunBiz報導，英特爾與三星電子在追趕市場龍頭台積電之際，雙雙採取風險性極高的技術策略，韓國一名半導體業界主管分析說，雖然技術風險高，但一旦成功，便能改...…

items.title: 巴威颱風逼近浙江 中國緊急疏散逾180萬人
items.summary: 颱風「巴威」逼近中國，預計於週日清晨在浙江省溫州市登陸。為因應暴風雨威脅，中國當局已緊急撤離東部沿海地區逾180萬名居民。  據《路透》報導指出，巴威颱風正朝向中國溫州持續前...…

items.title: 烏俄戰爭風向變了！ 烏國握「更多牌」久拖對俄更不利
items.summary: 華爾街日報10日報導，烏俄戰爭4年來，俄羅斯都押注能在消耗戰中撐得比烏克蘭還久，不過，烏克蘭近期的無人機攻擊，正對俄羅斯軍事和石油產業造成愈加嚴重的損失，莫斯科正發現，時間不盡...…
